item.title: Fuel tanker recovery with Pepe's Towing
item.description: A complex recovery operation involving a fuel tanker down an embankment, showcasing towing techniques, safety precautions, and heavy recovery equipment in action.

media:content.media:title: Fuel tanker recovery with Pepe's Towing
media:content.media:description: A complex recovery operation involving a fuel tanker down an embankment, showcasing towing techniques, safety precautions, and heavy recovery equipment in action.

item.title: Pepe's Towing Helps With a Tough Recovery
item.description: A vehicle becomes stuck in a difficult location, creating a challenging recovery scenario that requires careful towing and problem-solving to resolve safely.

media:content.media:title: Pepe's Towing Helps With a Tough Recovery
media:content.media:description: A vehicle becomes stuck in a difficult location, creating a challenging recovery scenario that requires careful towing and problem-solving to resolve safely.

item.title: Fuel tanker leaves freeway embankment
item.description: A fuel tanker leaves the freeway after swerving off course, prompting emergency response and an investigation into the cause of the incident and road conditions.

media:content.media:title: Fuel tanker leaves freeway embankment
media:content.media:description: A fuel tanker leaves the freeway after swerving off course, prompting emergency response and an investigation into the cause of the incident and road conditions.

item.title: Pepe's Towing: A Payment Dispute Unfolds
